reviews.review_description: It’s a fun and energetic VR sports game with a sci-fi twist. The variety of in play games keeps it fresh; it is straight forward to pick up and learn with easy, accurate controls. The visuals are cartoony but crisp, the environments are lively and music good.  And If you’re after a VR game that combines fitness, competition, and fun with lots of swinging and punching this is for you, this a great game and I look forward to seeing where the dev takes it

If you like VR sports / arcade games, and want something fun, energetic, with sci‑fi flair, Odania Sports Arena is definitely worth trying, This is a fun game that has several different sports games so you shouldn't get bored, easy to play and quite intuitive, and I believe the game delivers well.

I got to play all the mini games and once I learned how to play them I found it very enjoyable and a decent workout. Graphics were really good and there seems to be plenty to keep you busy. You can do a campaign or just play the games to keep score.

This is an easy to play sports fitness game.

Includes 5 different activities, most involve hitting a ball at enemies to destroy them.
One game you punch and swing at approaching enemies whilst dodging pillars along the way.

Graphics and sound are ok.

Need room to swing and punch, and dodge… not one if you are a sit down player.

Could work up a sweat with the included activities.. and it’s easy enough for any age to pick up and play.
